rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO ORANGE COUNTY** CONSERVATORSHIP OF MARIA ISSA LANSANGAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Authorizing Documents Be Filed Under Seal Or Alternatively Partially Redacted For Temporary And Limited Conservatorship
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners Darnee Lansangan and Dianne L. Garcia's Motion Authorizing Documents be Filed Under Seal or Alternatively Partially Redacted is GRANTED. The Clerk of the Court is ordered to redact the address of the Petitioners and conservatee from all documents, including the conservatorship paperwork, notices, and proofs of service. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 1/12/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
